heading: Recall to active duty during war or national emergency
label: 2308 Recall to active duty during war or national emergency
text: In times of war or national emergency, the Commandant may order any enlisted member on the retired list to active duty.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 185c (, ).May 24, 1939, ch. 146, § 453 Stat. 755This section was changed so as to make provisions for enlisted men parallel to similar provisions for commissioned and warrant officers (see §§ 240 and 310 of the revised title). It seems fair and equitable that similar provisions should apply to all classes of personnel insofar as practicable. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 359 of this title1984— substituted reference to enlisted member for reference to enlisted man.Pub. L. 98–5571950—Act , struck out all references to pay.Aug. 3, 1950

Delegation of AuthorityFor delegation of authority under this section, as invoked by section 2 of Ex. Ord. No. 13223, , 66 F.R. 48201, as amended, to Secretary of Homeland Security when Coast Guard is not serving as part of Navy, see section 5 of Ex. Ord. No. 13223, set out as a note under , Armed Forces.Sept. 14, 2001section 12302 of Title 10
